task_completion.description: Log in to the helpdesk system as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the helpdesk dashboard (FreeScout) logged in, or the login screen being filled with admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings for the 'Facilities' mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Mailbox Settings page specifically for the 'Facilities' mailbox (facilities@helpdesk.local).
The 'Auto-Reply' tab or menu item is selected in the mailbox settings navigation.

task_completion.description: Ensure the main Auto-Reply status is enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Auto-Reply status toggle or dropdown is set to 'Active' or enabled.
The checkbox for 'New Conversations' (or similar wording for initial messages) is checked.
The checkbox for 'Replies' (or similar wording for subsequent messages in a thread) is unchecked.
The 'Save' button is clicked, or a success notification (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the helpdesk interface, not a terminal or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI using database commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL queries or direct database manipulation are visible.

integrity.description: Settings were changed in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes appear in the live web application interface, not in a text editor modifying source code or HTML developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'Facilities' (facilities@helpdesk.local). Target Auto-Reply Settings: The main Auto-Reply feature must be enabled. Auto-reply for 'New Conversations' must be enabled (checked). Auto-reply for 'Replies' (subsequent replies) must be disabled (unchecked).
